<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List Device Types"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/devices/types"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get all existing device types (DeviceType).

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"Accesstoken","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Accesstoken}}"},"description":"Access token obtained via authorization."},{"name":"Appid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Appid}}"},"description":"App ID assigned when creating an application on the [Aqara Developer Platform](https://developer.aqara.com)."},{"name":"Keyid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Keyid}}"},"description":"Key ID assigned when creating an application on the [Aqara Developer Platform](https://developer.aqara.com)."},{"name":"Nonce","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Nonce}}"},"description":"Random string, should be different for each request."},{"name":"Time","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Time}}"},"description":"Request timestamp in milliseconds."},{"name":"Sign","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Sign}}"},"description":"Request signature.
